name: Impossible Chicken 'n Broccoli Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10" x 1-1/2".
3. Rinse broccoli in cold water and drain thoroughly.
4. Mix broccoli, 1 1/3 cups of the cheese, chicken, and onion with the vegetables in the pie plate.
5. In a blender or bowl, beat milk, eggs, baking mix, salt, and pepper for about 15 seconds on high speed, or whisk/beat until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture over the vegetables in the pie plate.
7. Bake at 400°F for 30-35 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Sprinkle remaining cheese evenly over top and bake an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
9. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
FOR HALF RECIPE:
Use 1-quart square or round casserole dish.
Reduce eggs to 2 and baking mix to 1/2 cup.
Divide remaining ingredient amounts in half.
Decrease blending time to about 10 seconds, and whisking or hand-beating time to approximately 30 seconds.
HIGH ALTITUDE: Increase baking time by 5 minutes. If using the recipe club's Lisa Crawley version, bake for an additional 45 minutes.
